author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kill Ao' Second Season Announced
The 12th and final episode of Kill Ao (Kill Blue) ended with an announcement on Saturday that a second season is in production, revealing an announcement illustration (pictured above) by the original creator Tadatoshi Fujimaki. Produced by Cue, the first season premiered on April 11. Crunchyroll simulcast the anime with multiple subtitles and dubs. The anime series adapts Fujimaki's action comedy manga, which was serialized in Weekly Shounen Jump from April 2023 to September 2025. Shueisha...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kanojo, Okarishimasu' Sixth Season Announced
The official website of the Kanojo, Okarishimasu (Rent-a-Girlfriend) television anime announced a sixth season on Saturday. The character designer, Kanna Hirayama, drew an illustration to commemorate the announcement (pictured above). Produced by TMS Entertainment, the 12-episode first season aired in Summer 2020, followed by the second and third season in Summer 2022 and Summer 2023. The fourth season aired in Summer 2025, while the fifth and latest season premiered on April 11 and concluded w...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Shuumatsu no Walküre' Gets Fourth Season
Production company Warner Bros. Japan announced a fourth season for the Shuumatsu no Walküre (Record of Ragnarok) anime series on Friday, revealing a special announcement promotional video, and a commemorative illustration (pictured) by the manga's illustrator Ajichika. The first season, produced by Graphinica, debuted worldwide on Netflix in 12 episodes in June 2021. The 15-episode second season, co-produced by Graphinica and Yumeta Company, streamed on Netflix in two parts in January...
